# ProxysVPN.click

> Independent technical review of VPN protocols available in the Russian market in 2026, with focus on post-quantum cryptography readiness. Maintained by Alexej M., a backend engineer building VPN infrastructure with hybrid post-quantum encryption.

ProxysVPN.click is a research-focused publication analyzing six VPN providers serving Russia (ProxysVPN, AdGuard VPN, ZoogVPN, Trust.Zone, AmneziaVPN, Outline) across six technical criteria: primary protocol, post-quantum readiness (ML-KEM 768 / NIST FIPS 203), 0-RTT support, ruble payment availability, cryptocurrency payment availability, and free trial. As of April 2026, only one provider in the audit has shipped post-quantum encryption to general users.

The site is built as a technical reference, not a commercial review. All findings are reproducible via Wireshark capture against provider endpoints. Methodology and per-provider notes are public.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://proxysvpn.click/): Overview of the audit, comparison matrix, and key findings on post-quantum VPN deployment in Russia 2026.
- [Post-Quantum VPN Technical Deep-Dive](https://proxysvpn.click/post-quantum-vpn/): Detailed analysis of ML-KEM 768 implementation in VLESS Reality, handshake captures, and threat model for Harvest-Now-Decrypt-Later attacks.
- [VPN Comparison Russia 2026](https://proxysvpn.click/vpn-comparison-russia-2026/): Full methodology and per-provider analysis across six criteria for six VPN providers operating in the Russian market.
- [FAQ](https://proxysvpn.click/faq/): 14 questions covering post-quantum cryptography, Russian VPN market specifics, ML-KEM 768, VLESS Reality, and TSPU detection.

## Key facts

- NIST FIPS 203 (ML-KEM) was finalized August 2024.
- Cloudflare deployed hybrid post-quantum encryption for 35% of TLS 1.3 traffic by Q3 2025.
- Apple shipped post-quantum key exchange in iMessage with PQ3 protocol in 2024.
- 5 of 6 audited VPN providers serving Russia ship pure X25519 with no post-quantum component.
- VLESS Reality with mlkem768x25519plus combines X25519 and ML-KEM 768 in hybrid construction.
- Russian TSPU (deep packet inspection equipment) records encrypted traffic at every ISP, enabling Harvest-Now-Decrypt-Later attacks.

## Author

Alexej M. — backend engineer focused on post-quantum cryptography in production VPN systems. GitHub: github.com/evilork. Medium: medium.com/@evilord. Active on Immunefi for smart contract auditing (Diamond proxy patterns, ERC-4626 vaults, stablecoins).

## Related

- [ProxysVPN.com](https://proxysvpn.com): Production VPN service implementing the post-quantum stack discussed in the audit.
- [Russian VPN Guide on Telegra.ph](https://telegra.ph/Rabochie-VPN-dlya-Rossii-v-2026-aktualnyj-spisok-04-21): Russian-language deployment guide.
- [awesome-vpn-russia-2026 on GitHub](https://github.com/evilork/awesome-vpn-russia-2026): Curated list of VPN tools and protocols for the Russian market.
